overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a slow aerial tour through a foggy neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves past a large pink holographic advertisement of a guitarist while revealing futuristic skyscrapers and eventually the interior of a luxury aerial vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury aerial vehicle interior with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: slowly moving past the cityscape in an aerial vehicle, observing the neon-lit skyline and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall building with visible balconies and illuminated windows on the left side of the frame
large pink neon hologram of a female guitarist wearing a cowboy hat, prominently displayed in the cityscape
cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with various illuminated windows and neon accents in the distance
tall building featuring large bright digital advertisements and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from inside an aerial vehicle looking out at a foggy cyberpunk cityscape at night. A prominent pink holographic musician dominates the center-right view while futuristic skyscrapers with neon lighting fill the background. The camera slowly pans right, causing the hologram to drift left across the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial vehicle interior with focus on passenger seating area

events.description: large pink hologram advertisement passes out of view to the left, revealing more of the vehicle interior
interior wall and white leather seating become visible on the right side as the camera continues panning

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, revealing the vehicle's luxurious interior seating and side windows while maintaining view of the city

entered.detail: white leather passenger seat with red stitching visible on the right side of the frame
dark interior wall paneling of the vehicle cabin visible as the camera turns right

segments.scene_description: As the hologram exits the left side of the frame, the camera reveals the luxurious interior of the aerial vehicle, including white leather seating on the right. The view continues to show the neon-lit cityscape through the windows while the interior cabin elements become prominent. The segment ends with a focus on the vehicle's interior paneling and distant city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide view of a neon-lit cityscape into the intimate interior of a luxury aerial vehicle. It begins by looking out through the glass at a foggy cyberpunk metropolis, where a massive pink holographic musician dominates the view against a backdrop of glowing skyscrapers. As the camera slowly pans right, the hologram drifts across the frame and disappears from view, gradually revealing the cabin's interior. The scene then shifts focus to the vehicle's white leather seating and sleek paneling, while the vibrant city lights remain visible through the windows. Finally, the perspective settles on the refined details of the cabin as the distant urban landscape recedes into the background.
